DD_ACTION_EXECUTION_ID.description: AWS CodePipeline action execution ID (used as CI job identifier for correlation).

DD_AGENTLESS_LOG_SUBMISSION_URL.description: Sets custom URL for submitting logs

DD_AGENT_HOST.description: The address of the trace agent that the tracer will submit to.

DD_AI_GUARD_ENABLED.description: Set to `true` to enable the SDK.

DD_AI_GUARD_ENDPOINT.description: URL of the AI Guard REST API.

DD_AI_GUARD_MAX_CONTENT_SIZE.description: Max size of the content property set in the meta-struct

DD_AI_GUARD_MAX_MESSAGES_LENGTH.description: Maximum number of conversational messages allowed to be set in the meta-struct

DD_AI_GUARD_TIMEOUT.description: Timeout used in calls to the AI Guard REST API in milliseconds (default 5000)

DD_API_SECURITY_ENDPOINT_COLLECTION_ENAB.description: Whether to enable endpoint collection for API Security.

DD_API_SECURITY_ENDPOINT_COLLECTION_MESS.description: Maximum number of endpoints that can be serialized per message.

DD_APM_FLUSH_DEADLINE_MILLISECONDS.description: Doesnt crash when spans are finished early and reached impending timeout

DD_APM_TRACING_ENABLED.description: Used to disable APM Tracing when using standalone products

DD_APPSEC_AUTO_USER_INSTRUMENTATION_MODE.description:
Controls the automated user tracking mode for user IDs and logins collections. Possible values:
* 'anonymous': will hash user IDs and user logins before collecting them
* 'anon': alias for 'anonymous'
* 'safe': deprecated alias for 'anonymous'
* 'identification': will collect user IDs and logins without redaction
* 'ident': alias for 'identification'
* 'extended': deprecated alias for 'identification'
* 'disabled': will not collect user IDs and logins
Unknown values will be considered as 'disabled'

DD_APPSEC_COLLECT_ALL_HEADERS.description: Whether to enable extended headers collection

DD_APPSEC_GRAPHQL_BLOCKED_TEMPLATE_JSON.description: Specifies a path to a custom blocking template json file for graphql requests

DD_APPSEC_HTTP_BLOCKED_TEMPLATE_HTML.description: Specifies a path to a custom blocking template html file.

DD_APPSEC_HTTP_BLOCKED_TEMPLATE_JSON.description: Specifies a path to a custom blocking template json file.

DD_APPSEC_MAX_COLLECTED_HEADERS.description: Specifies the maximum number of headers collected.

DD_APPSEC_MAX_STACK_TRACES.description: Specifies the maximum number of stack traces to be reported.

DD_APPSEC_MAX_STACK_TRACE_DEPTH.description: Specifies the maximum depth of a stack trace to be reported.

DD_APPSEC_OBFUSCATION_PARAMETER_KEY_REGE.description: Specifies a regex that will redact sensitive data by its key in attack reports.

DD_APPSEC_OBFUSCATION_PARAMETER_VALUE_RE.description: Specifies a regex that will redact sensitive data by its value in attack reports.

DD_APPSEC_RASP_COLLECT_REQUEST_BODY.description: Whether to enable request body collection on RASP event

DD_APPSEC_RULES.description: Specifies a path to a custom rules file.

DD_APPSEC_SCA_ENABLED.description: DD_APPSEC_SCA_ENABLED is never used locally, but only sent to the backend

DD_APPSEC_STACK_TRACE_ENABLED.description: Whether to enable stack trace reporting.

DD_APPSEC_TRACE_RATE_LIMIT.description: Controls the maximum amount of traces sampled by AppSec attacks, per second.

DD_APPSEC_WAF_TIMEOUT.description: Controls the maximum amount of time in microseconds the WAF is allowed to run synchronously for.

DD_APP_KEY.description: Your Datadog application key. This key is created by your [Datadog organization][2], should include the code_analysis_read scope, and be stored as a secret.

DD_CIVISIBILITY_AGENTLESS_ENABLED.description: Does not init if DD_API_KEY is not set

DD_CIVISIBILITY_AGENTLESS_URL.description: Does not change mocha config if CI Visibility fails to init

DD_CIVISIBILITY_AUTO_INSTRUMENTATION_PRO.description: Name of the CI Visibility auto-instrumentation tool that injected dd-trace (telemetry only).

DD_CIVISIBILITY_DANGEROUSLY_FORCE_COVERA.description: Force-enable CI Visibility behavior for testing or debugging.

DD_CIVISIBILITY_DANGEROUSLY_FORCE_TEST_S.description: Force-enable CI Visibility behavior for testing or debugging.

DD_CIVISIBILITY_FLAKY_RETRY_COUNT.description: ATR is disabled for an attempt to fix test

DD_CIVISIBILITY_FLAKY_RETRY_ENABLED.description: Is disabled if DD_CIVISIBILITY_FLAKY_RETRY_ENABLED is false

DD_CIVISIBILITY_GIT_UPLOAD_ENABLED.description: Disable git upload if the DD_CIVISIBILITY_GIT_UPLOAD_ENABLED is set to false

DD_CIVISIBILITY_IMPACTED_TESTS_DETECTION.description: Not be detected as impacted if DD_CIVISIBILITY_IMPACTED_TESTS_DETECTION_ENABLED is false

DD_CIVISIBILITY_ITR_ENABLED.description: Disable ITR if DD_CIVISIBILITY_ITR_ENABLED is set to false

DD_CIVISIBILITY_RUM_FLUSH_WAIT_MILLIS.description: Wait time in milliseconds before flushing CI Visibility RUM events.

DD_CIVISIBILITY_TEST_SESSION_ID.description:
TODO: Figure out alternative ways to pass this information to the worker threads
eslint-disable-next-line eslint-rules/eslint-process-env

DD_CODE_ORIGIN_FOR_SPANS_ENABLED.description: Whether to enable Code Origin for Spans.

DD_CODE_ORIGIN_FOR_SPANS_EXPERIMENTAL_EX.description: Configuration for Code Origin for Spans.

DD_CRASHTRACKING_ENABLED.description: Disable crash tracking for SSI when configured

DD_CUSTOM_TRACE_ID.description: Custom variable set by the Jenkins Datadog Plugin for trace IDs.

DD_DBM_PROPAGATION_MODE.description: Enables DBM to APM link using tag injection.

DD_DOGSTATSD_HOST.description: The hostname of the Dogstatsd agent that the metrics will submitted to.

DD_DOGSTATSD_PORT.description: The port of the Dogstatsd agent that the metrics will submitted to.

DD_DYNAMIC_INSTRUMENTATION_CAPTURE_TIMEO.description: Timeout in milliseconds for capturing variable values.

DD_DYNAMIC_INSTRUMENTATION_PROBE_FILE.description: Path to a custom probes configuration file.

DD_DYNAMIC_INSTRUMENTATION_REDACTED_IDEN.description: List of identifier names to redact in captured data.

DD_DYNAMIC_INSTRUMENTATION_REDACTION_EXC.description: List of identifier names to exclude from redaction.

DD_DYNAMIC_INSTRUMENTATION_UPLOAD_INTERV.description: Interval in seconds between uploads of probe data.

DD_ENV.description: Set an application’s environment e.g. prod, pre-prod, stage.

DD_EXPERIMENTAL_APPSEC_STANDALONE_ENABLE.description: Used to disable APM Tracing when using standalone products

DD_EXPERIMENTAL_FLAGGING_PROVIDER_ENABLE.description:
Whether to enable the feature flagging provider.
Requires Remote Config to be properly configured.

DD_GIT_COMMIT_HEAD_SHA.description: Git commit SHA for git metadata collection.

DD_GIT_FOLDER_PATH.description: Disables telemetry if inside a jest worker

DD_GIT_PROPERTIES_FILE.description: Disables telemetry if inside a jest worker

DD_GIT_PULL_REQUEST_BASE_BRANCH.description: Git base branch information for pull requests.

DD_GIT_PULL_REQUEST_BASE_BRANCH_SHA.description: Git commit SHA for git metadata collection.

DD_HEAP_SNAPSHOT_COUNT.description: Number of heap snapshots to write. Set to 0 to disable.

DD_HEAP_SNAPSHOT_DESTINATION.description: Directory path where heap snapshots are written.

DD_HEAP_SNAPSHOT_INTERVAL.description: Delay in seconds between heap snapshots.

DD_IAST_DB_ROWS_TO_TAINT.description: Defines the number of rows to taint in data coming from databases

DD_IAST_MAX_CONCURRENT_REQUESTS.description: Controls how many request can be analyzing code vulnerabilities at the same time

DD_IAST_MAX_CONTEXT_OPERATIONS.description: Controls how many code vulnerabilities can be detected in the same request

DD_IAST_REDACTION_NAME_PATTERN.description: Specifies a regex that will redact sensitive source names in vulnerability reports.

DD_IAST_REDACTION_VALUE_PATTERN.description: Specifies a regex that will redact sensitive source values in vulnerability reports.

DD_IAST_REQUEST_SAMPLING.description: Controls the percentage of requests that iast will analyze

DD_IAST_SECURITY_CONTROLS_CONFIGURATION.description:
Allows to enable security controls. This option is not supported when
using ESM.

DD_IAST_STACK_TRACE_ENABLED.description: Whether to enable stack trace reporting.

DD_IAST_TELEMETRY_VERBOSITY.description: Specifies the verbosity of the sent telemetry. Default 'INFORMATION'

DD_INSTRUMENTATION_CONFIG_ID.description: Identifier used for configuration and correlation.

DD_INSTRUMENTATION_INSTALL_ID.description: Support legacy direct-set fields through all stable config and env var sources

DD_INSTRUMENTATION_INSTALL_TIME.description: Support legacy direct-set fields through all stable config and env var sources

DD_INSTRUMENTATION_INSTALL_TYPE.description: Support legacy direct-set fields through all stable config and env var sources

DD_INSTRUMENTATION_TELEMETRY_ENABLED.description: Can run tests and report tests

DD_INTERNAL_PROFILING_LONG_LIVED_THRESHO.description: This is only used in testing to not have to wait 30s

DD_LAMBDA_HANDLER.description: Correctly patch handler where context is the third argument

DD_LANGCHAIN_SPAN_CHAR_LIMIT.description: Maximum number of characters recorded for langchain span data.

DD_LANGCHAIN_SPAN_PROMPT_COMPLETION_SAMP.description: Rate for langchain span prompt completion.

DD_LLMOBS_AGENTLESS_ENABLED.description: Set to `true` to disable sending data that requires a Datadog Agent.

DD_LLMOBS_ENABLED.description: Disable llmobs if DD_LLMOBS_ENABLED is set to false

DD_LLMOBS_ML_APP.description: The name of your ML application.

DD_LOGS_INJECTION.description:
Whether to enable trace ID injection in log records to be able to correlate
traces with logs.

DD_LOG_LEVEL.description: Set the level for the [Datadog Agent log][8].

DD_METRICS_OTEL_ENABLED.description: Does not initialize when OTEL metrics are explicitly disabled

DD_OPENAI_SPAN_CHAR_LIMIT.description: Maximum number of characters recorded for openai span data.

DD_PIPELINE_EXECUTION_ID.description: Identifier used for configuration and correlation.

DD_PLAYWRIGHT_WORKER.description: Internal marker (set to `1`) used to detect Playwright worker processes for CI Visibility IPC payload routing.

DD_PROFILING_ASYNC_CONTEXT_FRAME_ENABLED.description: Can be turned off by env var

DD_PROFILING_CODEHOTSPOTS_ENABLED.description: Prioritize non-experimental env variables and warn about experimental ones

DD_PROFILING_CPU_ENABLED.description: If set to false, disables the CPU profiling. Defaults to true.

DD_PROFILING_DEBUG_SOURCE_MAPS.description: Be able to read some env vars

DD_PROFILING_DEBUG_UPLOAD_COMPRESSION.description: Flush when the profiler is stopped

DD_PROFILING_ENDPOINT_COLLECTION_ENABLED.description: Log deprecation warning for deprecated configurations

DD_PROFILING_EXPERIMENTAL_CODEHOTSPOTS_E.description: Prioritize non-experimental env variables and warn about experimental ones

DD_PROFILING_EXPERIMENTAL_ENDPOINT_COLLE.description: Log deprecation warning for deprecated configurations

DD_PROFILING_EXPERIMENTAL_OOM_EXPORT_STR.description: Sends a heap profile on OOM with async callback

DD_PROFILING_EXPERIMENTAL_OOM_HEAP_LIMIT.description: Sends a heap profile on OOM with async callback

DD_PROFILING_EXPERIMENTAL_OOM_MAX_HEAP_E.description: Sends a heap profile on OOM with async callback

DD_PROFILING_EXPORTERS.description: Code hotspots and endpoint tracing works

DD_PROFILING_HEAP_ENABLED.description: If set to true, enables Live Heap profiling (in Preview). Defaults to false.

DD_PROFILING_HEAP_SAMPLING_INTERVAL.description: Be able to read some env vars

DD_PROFILING_PPROF_PREFIX.description: Be able to read some env vars

DD_PROFILING_SOURCE_MAP.description: Enable/disable source map support for profiling.

DD_PROFILING_TIMELINE_ENABLED.description: Be able to read some env vars

DD_PROFILING_UPLOAD_TIMEOUT.description: Be able to read some env vars

DD_PROFILING_WALLTIME_ENABLED.description: If set to false, disables the Wall time profiling. Defaults to true.

DD_REMOTE_CONFIG_POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS.description: Specifies the remote configuration polling interval in seconds

DD_RUNTIME_METRICS_RUNTIME_ID_ENABLED.description: Whether to add an auto-generated `runtime-id` tag to metrics.

DD_SERVICE.description:
The service name to be used for this program. If not set, the service name
will attempted to be inferred from package.json

DD_SERVICE_MAPPING.description: Provide service name mappings for each plugin.

DD_SITE.description: Datadog site/region to send data to. Set this when your org is not on `datadoghq.com`.

DD_SPAN_SAMPLING_RULES.description: Span sampling rules that take effect when the enclosing trace is dropped, to ingest single spans

DD_SPAN_SAMPLING_RULES_FILE.description: Span sampling rules that take effect when the enclosing trace is dropped, to ingest single spans

DD_TAGS.description: Tags to apply to produced data. Must be a list of <key>:<value> separated by commas such as: layer:api,team:intake.

DD_TELEMETRY_DEBUG.description: Add debug header if DD_TELEMETRY_DEBUG is present

DD_TELEMETRY_LOG_COLLECTION_ENABLED.description: Be disabled and not subscribe if DD_TELEMETRY_LOG_COLLECTION_ENABLED = false

DD_TEST_FAILED_TEST_REPLAY_ENABLED.description: Does not activate it if DD_TEST_FAILED_TEST_REPLAY_ENABLED is set to false

DD_TEST_FLEET_CONFIG_PATH.description: Disable stats if config property is used

DD_TEST_LOCAL_CONFIG_PATH.description: Disable stats if config property is used

DD_TEST_MANAGEMENT_ATTEMPT_TO_FIX_RETRIE.description: Number of retries used by Test Management.

DD_TEST_MANAGEMENT_ENABLED.description: Does not disable tests if DD_TEST_MANAGEMENT_ENABLED is set to false

DD_TRACE_AGENT_PORT.description: The port of the trace agent that the tracer will submit to.

DD_TRACE_AGENT_PROTOCOL_VERSION.description: Protocol version to use for requests to the agent. The version configured must be supported by the agent version installed or all traces will be dropped.

DD_TRACE_AGENT_URL.description: Inject Unix Domain Socket path in DD_TRACE_AGENT_URL environment variable and the volume definition to access the corresponding path. Inject URL to use to connect the Datadog Agent for DogStatsD metrics in DD_DOGSTATSD_URL.

DD_TRACE_AWS_ADD_SPAN_POINTERS.description: Enable/disable span pointers for supported AWS SDK operations.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_AWS_BATCH_PROPAGATION_E.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk aws batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_BATCH_PROPAGATION_ENABL.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_BEDROCKRUNTIME_BATCH_PR.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk bedrockruntime batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_CLOUDWATCHLOGS_BATCH_PR.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk cloudwatchlogs batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_DYNAMODB_BATCH_PROPAGAT.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk dynamodb batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_EVENTBRIDGE_BATCH_PROPA.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk eventbridge batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_KINESIS_BATCH_PROPAGATI.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk kinesis batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_LAMBDA_BATCH_PROPAGATIO.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk lambda batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_NODE_HTTP_HANDLER_ENABL.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk node http handler.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_REDSHIFT_BATCH_PROPAGAT.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk redshift batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_S3_BATCH_PROPAGATION_EN.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk s3 batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_SFN_BATCH_PROPAGATION_E.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk sfn batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_SFN_CLIENT_ENABLED.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk sfn client.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_SMITHY_CLIENT_ENABLED.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk smithy client.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_SNS_BATCH_PROPAGATION_E.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk sns batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_SQS_BATCH_PROPAGATION_E.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk sqs batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_STATES_BATCH_PROPAGATIO.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk states batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AWS_SDK_STEPFUNCTIONS_BATCH_PRO.description: Enable/disable trace aws sdk stepfunctions batch propagation.

DD_TRACE_AZURE_EVENTHUBS_BATCH_LINKS_ENA.description: Enable/disable trace azure eventhubs batch links.

DD_TRACE_AZURE_SERVICEBUS_BATCH_LINKS_EN.description: Enable/disable trace azure servicebus batch links.

DD_TRACE_BAGGAGE_MAX_BYTES.description: The maximum number of bytes in the baggage header value. Values less than 3 bytes prevent propagation, because this is the minimum size for a valid key-value pair (for example, k=v).

DD_TRACE_BAGGAGE_MAX_ITEMS.description: The maximum number of key-value pairs in the baggage header.

DD_TRACE_BAGGAGE_TAG_KEYS.description:
A comma-separated list of baggage keys that are automatically applied as span tags to the local root span. For example, a baggage key `user.id` is tagged as `baggage.user.id`

This feature only applies to baggage extracted from incoming HTTP headers. Baggage set with the baggage API is not included.
- To tag all baggage items, set the value to `*`. Use this with caution to avoid exposing sensitive data in tags.
- To disable this feature, set the value to an empty string.

DD_TRACE_BEAUTIFUL_LOGS.description: Pretty-print JSON payloads in tracer debug logs (adds indentation).

DD_TRACE_CLIENT_IP_ENABLED.description: Whether to enable client IP collection from relevant IP headers

DD_TRACE_CLIENT_IP_HEADER.description: Custom header name to source the http.client_ip tag from.

DD_TRACE_CLOUD_PAYLOAD_TAGGING_MAX_DEPTH.description: Maximum depth of payload traversal for tags

DD_TRACE_CLOUD_REQUEST_PAYLOAD_TAGGING.description:
Additional JSONPath queries to replace with `redacted` in request payloads
Undefined or invalid JSONPath queries disable the feature for requests.

DD_TRACE_CLOUD_RESPONSE_PAYLOAD_TAGGING.description:
Additional JSONPath queries to replace with `redacted` in request payloads
Undefined or invalid JSONPath queries disable the feature for requests.

DD_TRACE_DEBUG.description: Enables or disables debug logging (Could help in case of troubleshooting investigation). Valid values are: true or false. Defaults to false.

DD_TRACE_DISABLED_PLUGINS.description: Comma-separated list of plugin IDs to disable. See `index.d.ts` `interface Plugins` for valid IDs.

DD_TRACE_DYNAMODB_TABLE_PRIMARY_KEYS.description: JSON object mapping DynamoDB table names to primary key field names (1-2) used for span pointers.

DD_TRACE_ENABLED.description: Enables trace collection. Defaults to true. For more information about trace collection environment variables, see [Library Configuration][9].

DD_TRACE_ENCODING_DEBUG.description: Enable/disable additional trace encoding debug logging.

DD_TRACE_EXPERIMENTAL_EXPORTER.description: Whether to write traces to log output or agentless, rather than send to an agent

DD_TRACE_EXPERIMENTAL_GET_RUM_DATA_ENABL.description: Whether to enable the experimental `getRumData` method.

DD_TRACE_EXPERIMENTAL_RUNTIME_ID_ENABLED.description: Set new runtimeMetricsRuntimeId from deprecated DD_TRACE_EXPERIMENTAL_RUNTIME_ID_ENABLED

DD_TRACE_FLUSH_INTERVAL.description: Interval in milliseconds at which the tracer will submit traces to the agent.

DD_TRACE_GIT_METADATA_ENABLED.description: Disables telemetry if inside a jest worker

DD_TRACE_GLOBAL_TAGS.description: Give priority to the common agent environment variable

DD_TRACE_GRAPHQL_ERROR_EXTENSIONS.description: Comma-separated list of GraphQL error extension keys to record on span events.

DD_TRACE_HEADER_TAGS.description: Automatically apply specified HTTP headers as span tags. If a custom tag name is not specified, the tag key defaults to http.request.headers. for request headers and http.response.headers. for response headers.

DD_TRACE_LOG_LEVEL.description: Capture telemetry if both DD and OTEL env vars are set

DD_TRACE_MEMCACHED_COMMAND_ENABLED.description: Requires an accompanying DD_APM_OBFUSCATION_MEMCACHED_KEEP_COMMAND=true in the agent

DD_TRACE_NATIVE_SPAN_EVENTS.description: Encode span events in the native `span_events` payload format instead of `meta.events` JSON.

DD_TRACE_OBFUSCATION_QUERY_STRING_REGEXP.description: Applies a regex to redact sensitive data from query strings on incoming HTTP requests. The default regex matches various sensitive data patterns, including passwords, tokens, API keys, private keys, and authorization terms. Matches are r...

DD_TRACE_OPENTELEMETRY_SDK_TRACE_NODE_EN.description: Enable/disable trace opentelemetry sdk trace node.

DD_TRACE_PARTIAL_FLUSH_MIN_SPANS.description: Number of spans before partially exporting a trace. This prevents keeping all the spans in memory for very large traces.

DD_TRACE_PEER_SERVICE_DEFAULTS_ENABLED.description: Activate peer service in v1 unless explicitly false

DD_TRACE_PROPAGATION_BEHAVIOR_EXTRACT.description: Not extract baggage when Trace_Propagation_Behavior_Extract is set to ignore

DD_TRACE_PROPAGATION_EXTRACT_FIRST.description: Read case-insensitive booleans from environment variables

DD_TRACE_PROPAGATION_STYLE.description: Selection of context propagation injection mechanisms.

DD_TRACE_PROPAGATION_STYLE_EXTRACT.description: Selection and priority order of context propagation extraction mechanisms.

DD_TRACE_PROPAGATION_STYLE_INJECT.description: Selection of context propagation injection mechanisms.

DD_TRACE_RATE_LIMIT.description:
Global rate limit that is applied on the global sample rate and all rules,
and controls the ingestion rate limit between the agent and the backend.
Defaults to deferring the decision to the agent.

DD_TRACE_REMOVE_INTEGRATION_SERVICE_NAME.description: Enable/disable trace remove integration service names.

DD_TRACE_REPORT_HOSTNAME.description: Whether to report the hostname of the service host. This is used when the agent is deployed on a different host and cannot determine the hostname automatically.

DD_TRACE_RESOURCE_RENAMING_ENABLED.description: Be disabled when DD_TRACE_RESOURCE_RENAMING_ENABLED is false

DD_TRACE_SAMPLE_RATE.description: Controls the ingestion sample rate (between 0 and 1) between the agent and the backend.

DD_TRACE_SAMPLING_RULES.description:
Sampling rules to apply to priority sampling. Each rule is a JSON,
consisting of `service` and `name`, which are regexes to match against
a trace's `service` and `name`, and a corresponding `sampleRate`. If not
specified, will defer to global sampling rate for all spans.

DD_TRACE_SCOPE.description: Legacy scope configuration (async context propagation); currently has no effect.

DD_TRACE_SPAN_ATTRIBUTE_SCHEMA.description: Activate peer service in v1 unless explicitly false

DD_TRACE_TAGS.description: Additional tags to apply to traces, as comma-separated `key:value` pairs.

DD_TRACE_WEBSOCKET_MESSAGES_INHERIT_SAMP.description: By default, websocket messages preserve the same sampling as the span captured during the handshake. This ensures that, if a handshake span has been sampled, all the messages in its session will also be sampled. To disable that behavior and sample each websocket message independently, set this configuration to `false`.

DD_TRACE_WEBSOCKET_MESSAGES_SEPARATE_TRA.description: By default, each received message generates a new trace. The handshake is linked to it as a span link. Setting this parameter to `false` causes all the spans captured during the session to be in the same trace.

DD_TRACE_X_DATADOG_TAGS_MAX_LENGTH.description: Maximum length of the `x-datadog-tags` header for trace tag propagation. Set to 0 to disable.

DD_VERSION.description:
The version number of the application. If not set, the version
will attempted to be inferred from package.json.

DD_VERTEXAI_SPAN_CHAR_LIMIT.description: Maximum number of characters recorded for vertexai span data.

DD_VERTEXAI_SPAN_PROMPT_COMPLETION_SAMPL.description: Rate for vertexai span prompt completion.

DD_VITEST_WORKER.description: Internal marker (set to `1`) used to detect Vitest worker processes for CI Visibility IPC payload routing.

OTEL_BSP_MAX_QUEUE_SIZE.description: Rejects negative values for all configs

OTEL_BSP_SCHEDULE_DELAY.description: Rejects negative values for all configs

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT.description: Only set if there's a custom URL, otherwise let calc phase handle the default

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS.description: Configures OTLP headers from environment variable

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_LOGS_ENDPOINT.description: Appends /v1/logs to endpoint if not provided

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_LOGS_HEADERS.description: Prioritizes logs-specific headers over generic OTLP headers

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_LOGS_TIMEOUT.description: Configures OTLP timeout from environment variable

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_METRICS_ENDPOINT.description: Configures OTLP endpoint from environment variable

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_METRICS_HEADERS.description: Prioritizes metrics-specific headers over generic OTLP headers

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_METRICS_PROTOCOL.description: Logs warning and falls back to protobuf when gRPC protocol is set

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_METRICS_TIMEOUT.description: Configures OTLP timeout from environment variable

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TIMEOUT.description: Falls back to generic timeout when metrics-specific not set

OTEL_LOGS_EXPORTER.description: Capture telemetry if both DD and OTEL env vars are set

OTEL_LOG_LEVEL.description: Capture telemetry if both DD and OTEL env vars are set

OTEL_METRICS_EXPORTER.description: Capture telemetry if both DD and OTEL env vars are set

OTEL_METRIC_EXPORT_TIMEOUT.description: Rejects negative values for all configs

OTEL_PROPAGATORS.description: Capture telemetry if both DD and OTEL env vars are set

OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES.description: Capture telemetry if both DD and OTEL env vars are set

OTEL_SDK_DISABLED.description: Capture telemetry if both DD and OTEL env vars are set

OTEL_SERVICE_NAME.description:
The service name to be used for this program. If not set, the service name
will attempted to be inferred from package.json

OTEL_TRACES_EXPORTER.description: Capture telemetry if both DD and OTEL env vars are set

OTEL_TRACES_SAMPLER.description: Controls the ingestion sample rate (between 0 and 1) between the agent and the backend.

OTEL_TRACES_SAMPLER_ARG.description: Controls the ingestion sample rate (between 0 and 1) between the agent and the backend.
